evidence.snippet:
Controllers | Inverters | ESCs
HBCi controllers represent state of the art technology of electric motor control. Ranging from 3kW up to 400kW, manufactured in many variants to completely fulfill customers’ needs. Unrivalled performance, power density ratio, redundancy, safety and innovation.
MGM COMPRO significantly increases the number of delivered electric propulsion powertrains (EPS and ESS) for industrial and defence UAVs and eVTOLS.

items.notes: ESCs, inverters, motor controllers (HBCi series) are the core product line; sold for UAVs, eVTOLs, UGVs, and aviation

evidence.snippet:
Electric motors
The all new generation of MGM COMPRO electric motors (BLDC / PMSM) brings enhanced potential to electric applications. Based on the innovative topology of the motor magnetic field and winding design, we have achieved higher power density than ever before.

Gearbox Systems
Gearbox systems for high performance in-runner electric motors offer functionality for the control of single action hydraulic const. speed propellers. Parallelly provides range of safety features incl. the overspeed protection and conventional control logic.

items.notes: BLDC/PMSM electric motors and gearbox systems for aviation, UAV, and UGV applications

evidence.snippet:
ESS | Batteries
Energy Storage Systems designed according to the customers’ requirements with the most sophisticated technology focusing on the best use of energy, intelligent BMS, active & passive safety systems, effective mass production and certification.

BMS | Battery Management Systems
MGM COMPRO BMS systems provide unique care for cells and complex storage systems (ESS). Innovative methods determining residual cell energy, modularity, unique safety, redundancy and cutting-edge paramaters throughout the whole BMS family.

items.notes: Energy Storage Systems (ESS/batteries), Battery Management Systems (BMS), and industrial chargers

evidence.snippet: MGM COMPRO significantly increases the number of delivered electric propulsion powertrains (EPS and ESS) for industrial and defence UAVs and eVTOLS.

With a focus on various applications such as Electric Aircrafts, eVTOLs, Drones, UAVs, UGVs, UUVs, USVs, boats, military applications, jet-surfs & wake-boards and beyond, we are dedicated to making an impact globally. Our commitment is underscored by the deployment of unique testing/equipment, providing customers with exceptional data analysis and a complete spectrum of information.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells complete electric propulsion systems (EPS), energy storage systems (ESS), motor controllers (ESCs/inverters), and BMS to UAV/eVTOL/UGV OEMs; does not manufacture complete aircraft

evidence.snippet: HBCi controllers represent state of the art technology of electric motor control. Ranging from 3kW up to 400kW, manufactured in many variants to completely fulfill customers’ needs. Unrivalled performance, power density ratio, redundancy, safety and innovation.

ndaa.notes: No NDAA Section 848/889 claim or adjacent US compliance language found anywhere in corpus. Company is Czech-based.

evidence.snippet:
### Standard
products
Complete range of our off-the-shelf types of electric motors, inverters / ESCs / speed controllers 3kW up to 400kW, BMSs, electronic contactors, chargers and more.

readiness.notes: Site advertises off-the-shelf catalog products, 5000+ B2B customers, 50+ export countries, and in-house serial manufacturing. Also offers custom-built solutions as a secondary mode.

unresolved_questions: Named ESC/inverter variant SKUs beyond HBCi family not confirmed (controllers/inverters-escs page was skipped)

tagline: Czech Republic-based supplier of integrated electric propulsion subsystems: 200–400 kW EPS units, BLDC/PMSM motors, HBCi motor controllers (3–400 kW), battery management systems (BMS-4i through BMS-16Ai), and custom energy storage for aviation and UAV platforms. Production-ready across all lines; references include Airbus, Bell, NASA, and Siemens. NDAA and Blue UAS certification status unknown. Public evidence of US defense integration limited.
